input_text: Sandra travelled to the kitchen. Mike is very big. The horse kept in the stable was calm. Mary went to the bathroom. Winona is a cat. The cake was eaten by the child. The man carrying a bag waved. The picture was painted by Leo. The guide offered the tourists tea. The city was destroyed. Mr Dursley is a Muggle. Sue is a true patriot. Elephants, foxes and rabbits are neither birds nor small fish. Tallinn is probably in Estonia. Americans cannot disappear. Anna handed Mark a key. Agatha is in trouble. The length of Emajogi is 80 kilometers. John is a rabbit. Sheep are afraid of mice. The book was read by Sara. A blue square has a hole. If X1 is male and X1 is a grandchild of Y1, X1 is a grandson of Y1. The road leading to the village was narrow. The letter was written in June. Earth contains Europe. The teacher showed the students the map. Tom wanted to leave. Eve forgot to lock the door. The chef cooked a meal for the guests. The cup filled with water fell. The stone was heavy. The window was broken. Clinton defeated Dole. John is not a bird?
